<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Util\PHP; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class Result { private string $stdout; private string $stderr; public function __construct(string $stdout, string $stderr) { $this->stdout = $stdout; $this->stderr = $stderr; } public function stdout(): string { return $this->stdout; } public function stderr(): string { return $this->stderr; } }
